items.headline: Welcome to MiSTer Companion v3 Beta
items.message:
This beta includes the new PyQt6 interface and is a work in progress.

If you encounter any issues or bugs, please report them on GitHub to help improve the app.

If you prefer a stable experience, you can download the legacy version from the releases page below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is currently not available.

To properly support macOS builds and testing, a Mac device is needed.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
